hooks.command: which jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.content // empty' | grep -qE 'xoxc-YOUR-TOKEN-HERE|xoxd-YOUR-TOKEN-HERE|xoxc-EXAMPLE|xoxd-EXAMPLE|YOUR-TOKEN-HERE|REPLACE-ME|PASTE-TOKEN-HERE' && echo '[proagent-connector-setup] WARNING: Placeholder token detected in written file. Replace placeholder values with your actual tokens before proceeding.' || true
